sentences.spanish: ¿Qué es poesía? dices mientras clavas en mi pupila tu pupila azul.
sentences.english: What is poetry? you say while you pierce my pupil with your blue pupil.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué es poesía? ¿Y tú me lo preguntas? Poesía... eres tú.
sentences.english: What is poetry? And you ask me? Poetry... is you.

sentences.spanish: Volverán las oscuras golondrinas en tu balcón sus nidos a colgar.
sentences.english: The dark swallows will return to hang their nests on your balcony.

sentences.spanish: Pero aquellas que el vuelo refrenaban tu hermosura y mi dicha a contemplar...
sentences.english: But those that slowed their flight to contemplate your beauty and my happiness...

sentences.spanish: Por una mirada, un mundo; por una sonrisa, un cielo; por un beso... ¡yo no sé qué te diera por un beso!
sentences.english: For a look, a world; for a smile, a heaven; for a kiss... I don't know what I would give you for a kiss!

sentences.spanish: Los suspiros son aire y van al aire.
sentences.english: Sighs are air and go to the air.

sentences.spanish: Las lágrimas son agua y van al mar.
sentences.english: Tears are water and go to the sea.

sentences.spanish: Dime, mujer, cuando el amor se olvida ¿sabes tú a dónde va?
sentences.english: Tell me, woman, when love is forgotten, do you know where it goes?

sentences.spanish: Mientras haya unos ojos que reflejen los ojos que los miran, habrá poesía.
sentences.english: As long as there are eyes that reflect the eyes that look at them, there will be poetry.
